_comment: Template for `dcx import generic <path>`. Pre-process exotic LLM chat exports into this shape — anything that doesn't match one of the built-in importers (chatgpt / claude / gemini) can come through this path.

messages.content: How often should I descale my espresso machine?
Every 60 shots with citric acid is a good rule of thumb.
Remember that my timezone is America/Los_Angeles.
